sections.sectionTitle: Egypt-ah Jakob leh A Innkuante Pai

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin Israel, a neih khempeuh tawh a khuazin kipanin Beersheba tung a, a pa Isaac' Pasian tungah biakpiakna a bawl hi
Pasian in Israel tungah zanin thu gen a, “Jakob, Jakob,” ci hi. Amah in, “Hiah om ing,” ci hi
Tua ciangin amah in, “Kei pen na pa' Pasian ahi, Pasian ka hi hi. Egypt-ah paisuk ding lau kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam lian khatin tua lai-ah nang kong bawl ding hi
Egypt-ah nang tawh kong paisuk ding a, tua ciangin zong keimah in nang kong paipihto kik ding hi. Josef' khutsungah na si ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Beersheba panin Jakob dingkhia hi. Israel' tapate in a pa uh Jakob, a tate uh, leh a zite uh, amah puakna dinga Faro in a khak leeng sungah a pua uh hi
Amaute in zong Kanaan gam sunga a lam uh a ganhingte uh leh a nate uh la-in, Jakob leh ama suanlekhakte ahi
a tapate, ama tapate' tapate, a tanute, a tapate' tanute tawh Egypt-ah a pai uh hi. Amah in a suanlekhakte khempeuh Egypt-ah a paipih hi
Tu-in hihte pen Israel' suanlekhak, Egypt-ah a pai Jakob leh a tate' min ahi hi. Jakob' ta u pen Reuben
leh Reuben' tapate: Hanok, Pallu, Hezron, leh Karmi ahi hi
Simeon' tapate: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakhin, Zohar, leh Kanaan numei' tapa Shaul ahi hi
Levi' tapate: Gershon, Kohath, leh Merari ahi hi
Judah' tapate: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez, leh Zerah ahi hi. (Ahih hangin Er leh Onan Kanaan gamah si hi.) Perez' tapate: Hezron leh Hamul ahi hi
Issakhar' tapate: Tola, Puvah, Job, leh Shimron ahi hi
Zebulun' tapate: Sered, Elon, leh Jahleel ahi hi
(Hihte pen Paddanaram-ah Leah tawh a neih Jakob' suante hi a, a tanu Dinah tawh zong ahi hi. Numei leh pasal a vekpi-in sawmthumlethum ahi hi
Gad' tapate: Zifion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi, leh Areli ahi hi
Asher' tapate: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, leh a sanggamnu uh Serah ahi hi. Beriah' tapate: Heber leh Malkhiel ahi hi
(Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Leah tungah a piak Zilpah' tapate ahi hi. Amah in Jakob tawh hihte nei a, mi sawmleguk ahi hi
Jakob' zi Rachel' tapate: Josef leh Benjamin ahi hi
Josef in Egypt gamah On khua siampipa Potifera' tanu Asenath tawh Manasseh leh Efraim nei hi
Benjamin' tapate: Bela, Bekher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim, leh Ard ahi hi
(Hihte pen Rachel tawh a neih Jakob' suante hi a, a vekpi-in mi sawmleli ahi hi
Dan' tapa Hushim ahi hi
Naftali' tapate: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer, leh Shillem ahi hi
(Hihte pen Laban in a tanu Rachel' tungah a piak Bilhah in Jakob tawh a neih tapate hi a, a vekpi-in mi sagih ahi hi
Egypt gamah a pai Jakob-a' ahi ama suanlekhak, Jakob' tate' zite a kisim loin, a vekpi-in mi sawmgukleguk ahi hi
Josef in Egypt gamah a neih a tapate nih ahi hi. Egypt gamah a pai Jakob' innkuan khempeuh sawmsagih ahi hi.
Jakob in ama mai Goshen-ah amah lam a lak dingin Josef kiangah Judah ma sawl hi. Amaute Goshen gamah hong pai uh hi
Tua ciangin Josef in a leengte kithawi sakin Goshen-ah a pa Israel a dawn dingin a paito hi. A pa a muh phetin ngawng kawi-in tawlkhat sung a kap hi
Israel in Josef kiangah, “Na maitang mu khinin nang na nuntak lai thei ka hih manin tu-in ka si zongin phamawh nawnlo hi,” a ci hi
Josef in a sanggamte leh a pa' innkuanpihte kiangah, “Kei paito-in Faro' kiangah ka va gen ding a, ama tungah, ‘Kanaan gama om ka sanggamte leh ka pa' innkuanpihte kei kiangah hong pai hi
Amaute pen tuucing ahih manin gan kemte ahi uh hi. Amaute in a tuuhonte uh leh a bawnghonte uh leh a neih khempeuh uh hong paipih uh hi,’ ka va ci ding hi
Faro in note hong samin note kiangah, ‘Na nasep uh bang ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin

Goshen leitangah na ten' theihna dingun note in, ‘Kote hita leh ka pate uh hita leh ko na nasemte pen ka neu lai uha kipan tuhun dongin gankemte ka hi uh hi,’ na ci ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite-a' dingin tuucing peuhmah a kihhuai ahi hi,” a ci hi.
